subcodes.first_line: The leaves of the world, throughout the nights and days, resound with the mention of the Divine Lote-Tree, and all the kingdoms of existence yearn with each passing day for its presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اوراق عالم در لیالی و ایام بذکر سدره ناطق و لقایش را آمل ملکات عالم هر یوم در
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @call to action
